overview.description: The Invesco Floating Rate Municipal Income ETF (PVI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of VRDOs issued by US municipalities. PVI was launched on Nov 15, 2007 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: ICE U.S. Municipal AMT-Free VRDO Constrained Index

data.title: Final Trades: FCX, PVI, AAPL & DEO
data.text: The traders look at Apple's chart. With CNBC's Melissa Lee and the Fast Money traders, Tim Seymour, Bonawyn Eison, Jeff Mills and Brian Kelly.
